ourMission.title: Our Mission
ourMission.subtitle: Ethical, supportive, and personalized fertility journeys for every family.
ourMission.visionSubtitle: What drives our work today and shapes tomorrow
ourMission.missionText: At Happy Family, we believe every family deserves the opportunity to experience the joy of parenthood. Our mission is to provide compassionate, ethical, and personalized surrogacy and egg donation services that transform dreams into reality.
ourMission.vision1Text: Making surrogacy and fertility services accessible to families worldwide, regardless of their location or circumstances.
ourMission.vision2Text: Leading the industry with cutting-edge technology, medical expertise, and compassionate care standards.
ourMission.vision3Text: Building a supportive global community that celebrates diversity and empowers families on their journey.
ourMission.commitmentSubtitle: The principles that guide every decision we make and every family we serve.
ourMission.commitment1Text: Every family receives personalized attention, emotional support, and care that goes beyond medical procedures.
ourMission.commitment2Text: We maintain the highest ethical standards in all our practices, ensuring transparency and trust.
ourMission.commitment3Text: From initial consultation to post-birth care, we're committed to supporting families throughout their entire journey.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.subtitle: A dedicated team committed to making dreams come true
whoWeAre.storyText: Founded with a vision to help families achieve their dreams of parenthood, Happy Family has grown from a small local practice to a globally recognized surrogacy and egg donation center. Our journey began with a simple belief: every family deserves the opportunity to experience the joy of parenthood, regardless of their circumstances. Today, we continue to uphold this belief through our comprehensive services, expert team, and unwavering commitment to ethical practices.
whoWeAre.value1Desc: Our experienced professionals are passionate about helping families grow.
whoWeAre.value2Desc: We serve families from around the world with local expertise.
whoWeAre.value3Desc: Every family receives personalized attention and support.
whoWeAre.value4Desc: Years of successful outcomes and satisfied families.
whoWeAre.value5Desc: Your privacy and security are our top priorities throughout the journey.
whoWeAre.value6Desc: We work as partners with you, ensuring transparency and open communication.

whyChooseUs.reason3Desc: From initial consultation to post-birth support.
whyChooseUs.reason4Desc: Every journey is unique, every plan is customized.

whyChooseUs.reason6Desc: Round-the-clock care and assistance when you need it.

whyChooseUs.testimonial1Text: Happy Family made our dream of parenthood a reality. Their expertise and compassion were unmatched.
whyChooseUs.testimonial2Text: The team at Happy Family supported us every step of the way. We couldn't have asked for better care.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to common questions about our programs and support
faq.a1: We provide comprehensive surrogacy and egg donation programs with legal, medical, and 24/7 support.
faq.q2: Do you work with international families?
faq.a2: Yes. We support families worldwide with travel, accommodation, translation, and local coordination.
faq.a3: Contact us for a free initial consultation. We'll review your goals and create a personalized plan.
faq.a4: We offer surrogacy with own gametes, surrogacy with egg donor, egg freezing/preservation, and VIP concierge services.
faq.q5: How do I choose the right program?
faq.a5: During a free consultation, we assess your goals, timeline, and medical profile to recommend the best-fit program.
faq.a6: Costs vary by program and location. We provide a transparent, itemized budget and fixed-fee options where possible.
faq.q7: What legal protections are in place?
faq.a7: We coordinate with licensed attorneys to secure parentage and agreements that comply with local laws and your home country.
faq.a8: All parties complete medical, genetic (as needed), and psychological screenings to ensure safety and success.
faq.a9: At accredited partner clinics. The exact location depends on your program, legal requirements, and preferences.
faq.q10: How long does the process take?
faq.a10: Most journeys take 6-12 months from consultation to birth, depending on matching, legal steps, and medical factors.
faq.q11: Can I travel during the process?
faq.a11: Yes. Some appointments require in-person visits. We handle travel, lodging, and on‑the‑ground support.
faq.q12: What support do you provide during pregnancy?
faq.a12: A dedicated coordinator, 24/7 assistance, appointment management, and regular medical updates throughout.
faq.a13: Yes. We help with legal paperwork, travel documents, newborn logistics, and pediatric referrals.
faq.noResults: No results. Try a different search.

cardPoints: Confidential, supportive guidance throughout the process
Thorough medical and genetic screening for safety
Clear scheduling and communication at every step

items.question: Is egg donation safe?
items.answer: Egg donation is generally safe when done under medical supervision. Our team monitors your health throughout and explains risks and expectations before you begin.

items.question: How long does the process take?
items.answer: Timelines vary, but most donors complete screening and a donation cycle over several weeks. We will provide a clear schedule based on your availability.

items.question: Can I stay anonymous?
items.answer: We follow strict privacy practices. The level of identity disclosure depends on legal and program requirements, which we will explain clearly during your consultation.

surrogacyWithOwnGametes.title: Surrogacy with Own Gametes
surrogacyWithOwnGametes.description: For couples who wish to maintain a biological connection with their child, surrogacy with own gametes offers the most natural path to parenthood. In this program, the intended mother's eggs and the intended father's sperm are used to create embryos through IVF, which are then transferred to a carefully screened surrogate.

ivfProcess.title: IVF Process
ivfProcess.step1: The IVF process begins with ovarian stimulation, egg retrieval, fertilization, and embryo culture in the lab. Fertilization can be done using conventional IVF or ICSI depending on sperm quality.
ivfProcess.step2: The process is carefully monitored to optimize egg quality and embryo development. Lab specialists assess embryos over several days to select the ones with the highest chance of implantation.
ivfProcess.step3: Each step is customized based on the medical profile of the intended parents, ensuring the approach is tailored to their specific needs and fertility factors.

embryoTransfer.title: Embryo Transfer
embryoTransfer.step1: After fertilization, the healthiest embryos are selected for transfer to the surrogate's uterus. Timing and preparation of the surrogate are carefully managed to maximize implantation success.
embryoTransfer.step2: The surrogate is monitored closely before, during, and after the transfer. Hormonal support and lifestyle guidance are provided to create the best environment for the embryo to thrive.
embryoTransfer.step3: Each step is customized based on the medical profile of the intended parents, ensuring the approach is tailored to their specific needs and fertility factors.

question1.q: What is the cost of surrogacy with own gametes?
question1.a: The surrogacy cost varies depending on several factors including medical procedures, surrogate compensation, legal fees, and program location. We provide a transparent surrogacy cost breakdown during your initial consultation. The surrogacy price includes all medical procedures, gestational surrogacy services, and comprehensive support throughout the journey.

question2.q: How much does surrogacy cost for couples?
question2.a: The cost of surrogacy for couples typically ranges based on program selection, medical needs, and location. Our surrogacy costs are transparent and include all necessary services. We offer detailed cost breakdowns and payment plans to help make surrogacy accessible. Contact us for a personalized estimate based on your specific situation.

question3.q: How much does it cost to do surrogacy with IVF?
question3.a: The total cost for surrogacy with IVF includes IVF procedures, embryo transfer, surrogate mother compensation, legal services, and ongoing medical support. Surrogacy costs are comprehensive and cover all aspects from initial consultation through birth. We provide itemized pricing and can discuss financing options to help manage surrogacy expenses.

eggFreezing.title: Egg Freezing / Preservation
eggFreezing.description: Egg freezing, also known as oocyte cryopreservation, is a process that allows women to preserve their fertility by freezing their eggs for future use. This advanced reproductive technology offers women the opportunity to delay childbearing while maintaining the quality of their eggs.

process.title: The Egg Freezing Process
process.step1: The process begins with ovarian stimulation using fertility medications to encourage the development of multiple eggs. This is carefully monitored through blood tests and ultrasounds to ensure optimal egg development.
process.step2: Once the eggs reach maturity, they are retrieved through a minor surgical procedure called egg retrieval. The procedure is performed under sedation and typically takes 15-20 minutes.
process.step3: The retrieved eggs are immediately frozen using a process called vitrification, which preserves them at extremely low temperatures. This advanced freezing technique maintains egg quality and viability for future use.

benefits.title: Benefits of Egg Freezing
benefits.step1: Preserve fertility for women who want to delay childbearing due to career, education, or personal reasons. This is especially valuable for women in their late 20s to early 30s.
benefits.step2: Maintain egg quality by freezing eggs when they are at their peak fertility. This can be particularly beneficial for women facing medical treatments that may affect fertility.
benefits.step3: Provide peace of mind and reproductive options for the future. Frozen eggs can be stored for many years and used when the time is right for starting a family.

question1.q: What is the cost of egg freezing and preservation?
question1.a: The cost of egg freezing includes ovarian stimulation medications, egg retrieval procedure, vitrification process, and annual storage fees. Egg freezing costs vary based on the number of cycles needed and storage duration. We provide transparent pricing and can discuss payment plans to make egg preservation accessible.

question2.q: How much does it cost to freeze eggs for future IVF?
question2.a: Egg freezing costs for future IVF use include the stimulation cycle, retrieval procedure, freezing process, and storage. The total cost depends on your specific needs and how many eggs are retrieved. We offer comprehensive packages and can provide detailed cost breakdowns during your consultation.

question3.q: What are the costs associated with egg preservation?
question3.a: Egg preservation costs include medical procedures, medications, laboratory fees, and ongoing storage. The initial cost covers the complete freezing process, while annual storage fees apply for long-term preservation. We provide transparent pricing and can discuss all costs associated with egg freezing during your initial consultation.

surrogacyWithEggDonor.title: Surrogacy with Egg Donor
surrogacyWithEggDonor.description: For intended parents who need donor eggs, our surrogacy with egg donor program provides a comprehensive solution. This program combines the expertise of carefully screened egg donors with our experienced surrogates to help you build your family.

process.title: The Process
process.step1: We carefully match you with a qualified egg donor who meets your specific criteria. Our donors undergo thorough medical, psychological, and genetic screening to ensure the highest quality standards.
process.step2: The selected egg donor undergoes ovarian stimulation and egg retrieval. The eggs are then fertilized with the intended father's sperm or donor sperm through IVF procedures.
process.step3: The resulting embryos are transferred to a carefully matched surrogate who carries the pregnancy to term. Throughout the process, we provide comprehensive support and monitoring for all parties involved.

benefits.title: Benefits of This Program
benefits.step1: Access to a diverse pool of carefully screened egg donors with detailed profiles including medical history, education, and personal characteristics.
benefits.step2: Comprehensive support throughout the entire process, from donor selection to birth, ensuring a smooth and successful journey to parenthood.
benefits.step3: High success rates with our experienced medical team and proven protocols, giving you the best chance of achieving a successful pregnancy and healthy baby.

question1.q: What is the surrogacy price with egg donor?
question1.a: The gestational surrogacy price with egg donor includes donor compensation, IVF procedures, surrogate mother pay, legal services, and comprehensive medical support. Our surrogacy cost breakdown is transparent and covers all expenses from donor selection through birth. The price for surrogate mother services varies based on program specifics and location.

question2.q: How much does surrogacy cost when using an egg donor?
question2.a: Surrogacy costs with egg donor typically include donor fees, medical procedures, surrogate compensation, and legal expenses. The cost for surrogacy varies based on your specific needs and program selection. We provide detailed cost breakdowns and transparent pricing to help you understand all surrogacy expenses involved in the process.

question3.q: How much does it cost for surrogacy with donor eggs?
question3.a: The total cost of surrogacy with donor eggs includes egg donor compensation, IVF and embryo transfer procedures, surrogate mother price, legal documentation, and ongoing support. Surrogacy costs are comprehensive and we offer transparent pricing with detailed breakdowns. Contact us for a personalized estimate based on your specific requirements.

vipConciergeServices.title: VIP Concierge Services
vipConciergeServices.description: Our VIP Concierge Services provide comprehensive support for international intended parents, offering housing, translation, transportation, and personalized assistance throughout your surrogacy journey. We ensure your comfort and peace of mind during this important time.

services.title: Our VIP Services
services.step1: Premium housing accommodations in comfortable, fully-furnished apartments or hotels near medical facilities. We arrange everything from booking to check-in, ensuring your stay is comfortable and convenient.
services.step2: Professional translation services for all medical appointments, legal meetings, and important communications. Our certified translators ensure clear communication throughout your journey.
services.step3: Comprehensive transportation services including airport transfers, medical appointment transportation, and local travel assistance. We provide reliable, comfortable transportation for all your needs.

benefits.title: Why Choose VIP Services
benefits.step1: Seamless experience with all logistics handled by our experienced team, allowing you to focus on your journey to parenthood without worrying about practical details.
benefits.step2: Cultural and language support to help you navigate the local environment comfortably, with assistance available 24/7 for any questions or concerns.
benefits.step3: Peace of mind knowing that every aspect of your stay is professionally managed, from accommodation to transportation, ensuring a stress-free experience during this important time.

question1.q: What is included in VIP concierge services for surrogacy?
question1.a: Our VIP concierge services include premium accommodations, professional translation for all medical and legal appointments, comprehensive transportation including airport transfers, personal coordination, and 24/7 support. These services complement our surrogacy programs and ensure a seamless experience throughout your journey, regardless of surrogacy costs.

question2.q: How much does VIP concierge service cost for surrogacy?
question2.a: VIP concierge service costs vary based on the duration of stay, accommodation preferences, and level of support needed. The price includes all concierge services and is separate from surrogacy costs. We provide transparent pricing and can customize packages based on your specific needs and surrogacy program requirements.

question3.q: Do VIP services affect the overall surrogacy cost?
question3.a: VIP concierge services are optional and priced separately from core surrogacy costs. While surrogacy costs cover medical and legal services, VIP services provide additional comfort and convenience. We offer flexible packages and can discuss how VIP services can enhance your surrogacy experience without significantly impacting total surrogacy expenses.

hero.title: Gestational Surrogacy in Georgia: Your Secure Path to Parenthood
hero.description: Embark on a legally protected, world-class surrogacy journey in the Republic of Georgia. Since 1997, Georgia has offered one of the world's most supportive legal frameworks for international intended parents, granting automatic parental rights from birth with no court orders or adoption required. Our comprehensive, compassionate programs combine state-of-the-art IVF clinics, fully screened surrogates, and complete legal support to help you create your happy family safely and affordably.

highlights.title: Immediate Legal Parentage
highlights.description: Intended parents' names go directly on the birth certificate at birth.

highlights.title: 70% Savings vs. United States
highlights.description: All-inclusive, transparent packages starting from $40,000 to $60,000.

highlights.title: Zero Surrogate Parental Rights
highlights.description: The surrogate mother has no legal right to be recognized as a parent.

highlights.title: World-Class IVF Clinics
highlights.description: State-of-the-art medical equipment and high clinical success rates.

highlights.title: Fast and Secure Exit Process
highlights.description: Administrative birth certificate registration in just 5 to 10 days.

benefits.title: Why Intended Parents Choose Georgia Country
benefits.subtitle: Discover why thousands of couples from the UK, Europe, Australia, and the US choose Georgia as their trusted surrogacy destination.

cards.title: 100% Legally Secure
cards.description: Georgian law has explicitly protected intended parents since 1997. Under Article 143 of the Law on Health Care, you are recognized as the sole legal parents on the birth certificate from birth. The surrogate mother has zero legal or parental rights to the child, ensuring a worry-free process.

cards.title: Affordable Excellence
cards.description: Save up to 70% compared to surrogacy programs in the United States. Our all-inclusive, transparent packages cover top-tier IVF clinics, surrogate compensation, comprehensive prenatal care, and delivery in modern maternity hospitals with absolutely zero hidden fees.

cards.title: Streamlined Exit Process
cards.description: No pre-parentage court orders, special committee approvals, or post-birth adoption proceedings are required. Once the birth certificate is issued by the Civil Registry (usually within 5-10 days of birth), you can immediately apply for your baby's passport and travel home safely.

legal.title: The Legal Framework: 100% Protected Rights
legal.subtitle: A clear, regulated, and supportive legal framework ensures complete peace of mind for international intended parents.
legal.overview: The legal framework governing assisted reproductive technologies (ART) in Georgia is exceptionally clear and favorable for international intended parents. Under Article 143 of the Law of Georgia on Health Care (enacted in 1997), gestational surrogacy and egg/sperm donation are fully legal, regulated, and supported by the state.
legal.protectionsTitle: Key Legal Protections under Georgian Law:

protections.title: Automatic Legal Parentage
protections.description: Intended parents are recognized as the sole, automatic legal parents of the child from the moment of conception. No court orders, special committee approvals, or post-birth adoption proceedings are required.

protections.title: No Rights for Surrogate Mother
protections.description: Under Article 143, the surrogate mother (and any egg/sperm donor) has explicitly zero parental rights to the child. The surrogate mother cannot be recognized as a parent and has no legal right to keep the child after birth.

protections.title: Direct Birth Certificate Registration
protections.description: Your names are placed directly on the child's birth certificate as the mother and father. There is absolutely no mention of surrogacy, egg donation, or the surrogate mother on the official document.

requirements.title: Heterosexual Couples Only
requirements.description: Under current Georgian statutes, surrogacy and IVF programs are exclusively available to heterosexual couples. Single individuals and same-sex couples are not eligible.

requirements.title: Married or Cohabiting
requirements.description: Couples must be legally married or cohabiting for at least one year. A marriage certificate or cohabitation agreement must be provided.

requirements.title: Medical Need for Surrogacy
requirements.description: Intended parents must provide medical documentation of infertility, repeated IVF failures, anatomical uterine issues, or other medical reasons that make carrying a pregnancy impossible or dangerous.

process.title: The Gestational Surrogacy Process
process.subtitle: A comprehensive, step-by-step guide to your surrogacy journey in Georgia.

steps.title: Initial Consultation & Matching
steps.description: Your journey begins with a detailed consultation to discuss your needs, review medical history, and explain the programs. We then match you with a fully-screened surrogate mother and/or egg donor from our extensive database. All surrogates undergo rigorous medical, psychological, and background checks.

steps.title: Legal & Administrative Setup
steps.description: Drafting and signing of clear legal contracts that secure your parental rights and outline the responsibilities of all parties. These contracts are prepared in accordance with Georgian law and are notarized. We also assist with translating and preparing all required documents.

steps.title: IVF & Embryo Transfer
steps.description: The IVF procedure is performed at a state-of-the-art clinic in Tbilisi. Embryos are created using the intended parents' gametes or donor gametes, and are then transferred to the surrogate mother. Any remaining high-quality embryos are cryopreserved for future use.

steps.title: Pregnancy Care & Monitoring
steps.description: Once pregnancy is confirmed, the surrogate mother receives comprehensive prenatal care, regular medical checkups, and emotional support. We provide you with constant medical updates, ultrasound reports, and video calls, ensuring you are fully involved in every milestone of the pregnancy.

steps.title: Birth & Streamlined Exit Process
steps.description: The baby is delivered in a modern maternity hospital in Tbilisi. Following birth, the Civil Registry issues the official birth certificate within 5-10 days, naming only the intended parents. We then assist you with preparing the documentation for your home country's embassy to secure your baby's passport and travel home safely.

pricing.title: Transparent & Affordable Costs
pricing.subtitle: Save up to 70% compared to US surrogacy with complete financial transparency and guaranteed programs.
pricing.overview: Gestational surrogacy in Georgia is exceptionally cost-effective, with all-inclusive programs typically ranging from $40,000 to $60,000 USD. This represents a fraction of the cost of similar programs in the United States or Canada, where expenses can easily exceed $150,000. Georgia's lower cost of living and highly competitive medical sector allow us to offer world-class medical care and generous surrogate compensation at an affordable price.
pricing.inclusionsTitle: What is Included in Our All-Inclusive Packages?

inclusions.title: IVF & Medical Procedures
inclusions.description: All clinical fees, embryo creation, ICSI, PGT-A testing (if selected), and embryo transfers.

inclusions.title: Surrogate Compensation & Care
inclusions.description: Generous monthly allowance, maternity clothing, housing support, and post-birth compensation.

inclusions.title: Legal & Administrative Support
inclusions.description: Contract drafting, notary fees, translation, birth registration, and comprehensive embassy exit support.

inclusions.title: Prenatal Care & Maternity Delivery
inclusions.description: All prenatal checkups, medications, ultrasounds, and delivery in a premium private maternity hospital.

features: Full legal contract and birth registration support

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find detailed answers to the most common questions about surrogacy in Georgia country.

items.question: Is surrogacy legal in Georgia for foreign couples?
items.answer: Yes, gestational surrogacy and egg/sperm donation have been 100% legal, regulated, and supported by Georgian law since 1997. Under national statutes, the surrogate mother has explicitly zero parental rights, and intended parents are registered directly on the birth certificate as the sole legal parents of the child.

items.question: Who is eligible to pursue surrogacy in Georgia?
items.answer: Under current laws, surrogacy is available exclusively to heterosexual couples who are legally married or cohabiting for at least one year. Intended parents must also provide medical documentation of infertility or an inability to carry a pregnancy safely.

items.question: What is the status of the proposed 2023 draft law?
items.answer: In June 2023, the Georgian government proposed a draft bill to restrict commercial surrogacy to Georgian citizens. However, this bill has not been passed, and its discussion has been repeatedly postponed (most recently in mid-2025/2026). Surrogacy for foreign intended parents remains fully legal, operational, and safe under the existing legal framework.

items.question: How does the parentage and exit process work?
items.answer: The intended parents acquire legal parentage automatically at birth. Within 5-10 days of birth, the Civil Registry issues the child's birth certificate naming only the intended parents. You can then immediately apply for your baby's passport at your home country's embassy in Tbilisi to travel home safely.
